title: A woman reported recurring sightings of both oval and disc shaped UFOs in Pompeu-MG [1994]

text_preview:
[first report] APRIL 20th and APRIL 22nd, 1994.

APRIL 20th. On April 20, 1994, for 4 minutes, about 14 residents of the city of Pompeu, State of Minas Gerais, “were watching the sky [when] at approximately 11:30 pm they saw a blinking object that was descending at high speed and emitting a yellow beam of light”. According to the witnesses, the unidentified flying object was “approximately 600 meters (when closest)” away from [horizontally] her. And about 100 meters high. The description of the UFO by the witness who reported the sighting informs that the object was “oval”, about the size of “
summary: On April 20–22, 1994, residents of Pompeu-MG reported recurring sightings of oval and disc-shaped UFOs emitting yellow light beams at low altitude.
